meta.rule: Do not invent icons. Use confirmed Figma library icons or report TODO: confirm icon.

sizes.sidebar_exception: 17 observed once; do not use as default

usage_rules: Use confirmed Figma component-library icons before any other source.
If no matching library icon is confirmed, report TODO: confirm icon instead of drawing a new icon.
Element Plus icons may be used as a reference source only after their Figma node inventory is confirmed.
Keep all icons in one visual style within the same navigation, toolbar, table, or form region.
Use 16px as default UI/navigation icon size.
Use 20px status icons in Alert and Message.
Use neutral #383838 for sidebar navigation icons unless semantic state requires a confirmed semantic color.
anti_patterns: Do not generate arbitrary decorative SVG icons.
Do not mix filled, outlined, multicolor, and hand-drawn styles in one UI area unless the source library confirms it.
Do not resize icons freely to make spacing work.
Do not use emoji as icons in product UI.
Do not infer icon meaning from label text when the icon has not been confirmed in the Figma icon library.
